name: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Deuda Privada Global Fund
summary: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Deuda Privada Global Fund invests in global private debt instruments. It is managed by HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos. The fund's objective is to generate income through investments in privately placed debt securities across various global markets.
